nasb.text: We have obeyed the voice of Jonadab the son of Rechab, our father, in all that he commanded us, not to drink wine all our days, we, our wives, our sons or our daughters,

esv.text: We have obeyed the voice of Jonadab the son of Rechab, our father, in all that he commanded us, to drink no wine all our days, ourselves, our wives, our sons, or our daughters,

cnv.text: 我們的祖先利甲的兒子約拿達吩咐我們的一切話，我們都聽從了；我們和我們的妻子兒女，終生都不喝酒，

ccb.text: 我们遵守他的一切吩咐，我们和我们的妻子儿女从不喝酒，
